parameters.content:
## 🎬 Celebrity Selfie Movie Sets Generator

**✅ HIGGSFIELD KLING OMNI EDITION**

**How to use:**
1. Upload your photo directly
2. Choose generation mode (AI, Custom, Presets)
3. Submit and wait ~5-10 min per scene
4. Get ONE merged video URL!

**Models:**
- Kie.ai Nano Banana Pro (images)
- Higgsfield Kling Omni (first-last frame videos)

**Photo Hosting:** ImgBB (free)

**Auto-Merge:**
- FFmpeg on VPS
- All scenes merged automatically
- Single download link!

parameters.formDescription: Create your personalized journey through movie/TV history! Upload your photo and customize your experience.

values.fieldName: 🧠 AI Mode: Describe Your Dream Scenes
values.fieldLabel: 🧠 AI Mode: Describe Your Dream Scenes
values.placeholder:
Examples:
- 5 scenes with 80s action heroes
- Marvel superheroes from the MCU

values.fieldName: ✏️ Custom Mode: Scene Details (one per line)
values.fieldLabel: ✏️ Custom Mode: Scene Details (one per line)
values.placeholder: Format: Celebrity | Movie/Show | Era | Location | Costume | Gesture

values.formSubmittedText: 🎬 Your celebrity selfie video is being generated with SEAMLESS transitions! Processing time: ~5-10 min per scene. We'll send it to your WhatsApp when ready!

assignments.name: ai_prompt
assignments.value: ={{ $json['🧠 AI Mode: Describe Your Dream Scenes'] || '' }}

assignments.name: custom_scenes
assignments.value: ={{ $json['✏️ Custom Mode: Scene Details (one per line)'] || '' }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'nano-banana-pro', input: { prompt: $json.image_prompt, image_input: [$json.user_photo_url], aspect_ratio: $json.aspect_ratio || '9:16', resolution: '2K', output_format: 'png' } }) }}
